item.title: CERAWEEK Rio Tinto expects Resolution Copper mine to open by mid-2030s
item.description: Rio Tinto expects to open Arizona's Resolution Copper mine вҖӢby the mid-2030s, a senior executive of вҖҢthe miner told Reuters on Tuesday.

item.title: Arm unveils new AI chip, expects it to add billions in annual revenue
item.description: Arm Holdings announced a new artificial intelligence data center chip on Tuesday which вҖӢit said will add billions of dollars of revenue and represent a significant shift вҖҢin the company's strategy.

item.title: Brazil audit court sidesteps Banco Master ruling as parallel investigations unfold
item.description: Brazil's federal audit court TCU deferred its ruling on the Banco Master case despite the conclusion of an internal audit amid elements under review by вҖӢother authorities that are necessary for its decision, the judge overseeing the вҖҢcase said on Tuesday.

item.title: Estee Lauder's bet on Puig is bold fragrance play in a volatile world
item.description: Estee Lauder's potential combination with Puig Brands would put it in a direct fight with sector leader L'Oreal's premium fragrances, but could complicate the вҖӢU.S. company's turnaround plans just as the Iran war clouds the outlook for travel retail.

item.title: EU antitrust chief meets Google, Meta, OpenAI, Amazon CEOs amidst AI scrutiny
item.description: EU antitrust chief Teresa Ribera, who has voiced concerns вҖӢabout Big Tech extending its dominance into вҖҢartificial intelligence, will meet the CEOs of Alphabet , Meta Platforms and OpenAI on Tuesday, a European вҖӢCommission agenda item shows.

item.title: Delta suspends special treatment for Congress as shutdown sows chaos in airports
item.description: Delta Air Lines cited the impact вҖӢof a partial government shutdown that has disrupted U.S. air travel.

item.title: Microsoft to rent Texas data center dropped by Oracle and OpenAI, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: Microsoft has agreed to rent a data center project in Texas that вҖӢwas originally being developed for Oracle вҖҢand OpenAI, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the situation.

item.title: OpenAI non-profit names leaders, plans to spend $1 billion this year, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: OpenAI is вҖӢmaking several вҖҢkey hires to вҖӢlead вҖӢits non-profit arm вҒ and вҖӢis вҖӢplanning to spend $1 billion вҖӢin вҖӢvarious AI-related investments вҖҢthis вҒ year through the non-profit вҖӢunit, вҖӢBloomberg вҒ News reported вҖӢon вҖӢTuesday.

item.title: CERAWEEK US will roll out pilot surveys to track energy use by data centers
item.description: The U.S. Department of Energy's information arm will launch a series of pilot surveys on Wednesday aimed at вҖӢgauging the energy use of the country's data centers, the вҖҢadministrator of the agency told Reuters.

item.title: Poland to start work on a digital services tax, deputy PM says
item.description: Poland's government will start work on a digital services tax bill, Deputy Prime Minister and Digitalisation Minister Krzysztof Gawkowski вҖӢsaid on Tuesday, setting up a potential clash with вҖҢkey ally the United States.

item.title: Iran war starts to hit global economy, business surveys show
item.description: The Iran war is already taking a toll on major economies around the world, according to business surveys on Tuesday which showed how a вҖӢsurge in energy prices and rising uncertainty were dampening activity and pushing inflation expectations higher.

item.title: Microsoft president says winning trust of US communities is paramount to building data centers
item.description: Gaining the вҖӢapproval of local вҖҢcommunities has become paramount to building вҖӢdata centers вҖӢin the U.S., Microsoft вҒ President Brad вҖӢSmith said on вҖӢTuesday, as towns across the country increasingly protest вҖӢthe developments.

item.title: Traders bet $500 million on oil price just before Trump's post on delay to Iran attack
item.description: Traders bet half a billion dollars вҖӢon the price of crude only 15 minutes before U.S. President Donald Trump announced a five-day delay to attacks вҖҢon Iran's energy infrastructure that sent the market plunging, exchange data and Reuters calculations showed.

item.title: US-Ukrainian joint investment project to invest in dual-use military tech firm
item.description: A joint U.S.-Ukrainian reconstruction fund will make its first investment in вҖӢSine Engineering, a Ukrainian dual-use military вҖҢtechnology company, a source familiar with the plans said on Tuesday, with further projects вҖӢstill under review.

item.title: Britain's FCA defends Palantir contract award before lawmakers
item.description: U.S. data analytics firm Palantir, which won a contract to supply AI systems вҖӢto Britain's Financial Conduct Authority, will not have access to regulatory intelligence, an FCA official вҖҢsaid on Tuesday, as the deal came under criticism from lawmakers.

item.title: Apple to bring paid ads to maps to US, Canada this summer
item.description: Apple on Tuesday said it plans to introduce paid ads to вҖҢits maps service in the U.S. and Canada this summer, marking its entry into a business long dominated by Alphabet's Google.

item.title: Schindler ready to oppose potential Kone-TK Elevator merger, CEO says
item.description: Schindler would вҖӢbe ready to вҖҢchallenge a merger deal between rivals вҖӢKone and TK вҖӢElevator before antitrust authorities, вҒ the head вҖӢof the Swiss lift вҖӢmaker told Reuters on Tuesday.

item.title: Epic Games to cut more than 1,000 jobs as Fortnite usage falls
item.description: Epic Games said on Tuesday вҖӢit would lay вҖҢoff more than 1,000 employees as it вҖӢcuts costs after вҖӢa sharp fall in вҒ usage of its вҖӢflagship game, Fortnite.

item.title: US business activity slips to 11-month low in March amid Iran war, S&P Global survey shows
item.description: U.S. business activity slowed to an 11-month low in March as the war in the Middle вҖӢEast raised prices for energy products and other inputs, a survey showed on Tuesday, reinforcing fears of an вҖҢacceleration in inflation in the months ahead.

item.title: NYSE teams up with Securitize to develop tokenized securities platform
item.description: The New York Stock Exchange, part of Intercontinental Exchange , announced a collaboration on Tuesday with digital asset вҖӢcompany Securitize to help create tokenized versions of вҖҢtraditional financial securities.

item.title: Dollar General names retail veteran Jerry Fleeman Jr. as new CEO
item.description: Dollar General on Tuesday named вҖӢJerry Fleeman Jr. as вҖҢits new chief executive officer, effective January 1, 2027, replacing Todd вҖӢVasos.

item.title: Zoox to widen US robotaxi footprint with San Francisco, Vegas expansion
item.description: Zoox, Amazon's self-driving unit, said on Tuesday it will expand its robotaxi service in вҖӢSan Francisco and Las Vegas, and begin вҖҢtesting its purpose-built robotaxis in Austin and Miami, marking its broadest push yet into the U.S. autonomous ride-hailing вҖӢmarket.

item.title: US fourth-quarter productivity growth revised sharply lower
item.description: U.S. worker productivity growth slowed more than initially thought in the fourth quarter, government data showed, вҖӢboosting growth in unit labor costs.

item.title: FedEx launches same-day delivery service amid US delivery race
item.description: FedEx said on Tuesday it had launched a same-day delivery service вҖӢwith last-mile delivery software company OneRail, вҖҢas retailers and logistics firms race to speed up order fulfillment.

item.title: Russia launches low-orbit satellites in bid to one day rival Starlink
item.description: Russia said on Tuesday it had launched 16 low-orbit satellites as Moscow seeks вҖӢto build a rival to Elon Musk's вҖҢStarlink network.

item.title: Peltz's Trian, General Catalyst step up Janus bid as takeover fight intensifies
item.description: Janus Henderson said on Tuesday that Trian and General Catalyst have raised their bid вҖӢto buy the $493-billion asset manager to $52 per share, as it fends off a persistent вҖҢtakeover pursuit by Victory Capital .

item.title: US Easter spending to touch a record $24.9 billion in 2026, NRF forecasts
item.description: U.S. consumer spending on Easter is expected to rise to a record $24.9 вҖӢbillion in 2026, a 5.5% increase вҖҢfrom a year earlier, industry body National Retail Federation said on Tuesday, signaling robust demand вҖӢamid economic uncertainty.

item.title: Norway wealth fund moves towards some AI-driven decisions but with humans in control
item.description: Norway's $2.1 trillion sovereign wealth fund, the world's вҖӢlargest, will eventually allow some investment decisions to be made by AI systems under human supervision, вҖҢbut not yet, as the tools still make errors, fund officials said on Tuesday.

item.title: BMO to launch tokenized cash platform with CME and Google Cloud
item.description: Bank of Montreal said on Tuesday it plans to roll out tokenized cash capabilities in collaboration with CME Group and вҖӢGoogle Cloud, as it seeks to meet rising demand вҖҢfor realвҖ‘time payments amid a global shift toward aroundвҖ‘theвҖ‘clock trading.

item.title: Barclays raises 2026 year-end S&P 500 target to 7,650 despite Middle East, inflation risks
item.description: Barclays raised its 2026 year-end S&P 500 target on Tuesday, betting that strong corporate earnings led by вҖӢthe technology sector and resilient economic growth will outweigh rising вҖҢmacro risks, including war in the Middle East, AI-driven disruption and stress emerging in private credit markets.
